instruction:
Decide whether each of the tables below could represent a linear function or not. If so enter Yes and if not enter No in the blank space below each table. a) $\begin{array}{ccccc}\hline x & 3 & 6 & 9 & 12 \\ \hline h(x) & 15 & 10 & 0 &-10 \\ \hline \end{array}$
Could this be a linear function? [ANS] b) $\begin{array}{ccccc}\hline x & 2 & 17 & 32 & 47 \\ \hline f(x) & 42 & 30 & 18 & 6 \\ \hline \end{array}$
Could this be a linear function? [ANS] c) $\begin{array}{ccccc}\hline x & 6 & 14 & 22 & 30 \\ \hline g(x) &-16 &-28 &-42 &-56 \\ \hline \end{array}$
Could this be a linear function? [ANS]
